prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO155IMWSAH-155-BLCK-2 Product Type: SWORD Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 15.5 Inch Full Tang Machete with Serrated Spine and Recurved Blade Description: Blaze trails while you're hunting or camping with the ASR Outdoor 15.5" Machete with nylon sheath.

Chops like an axe. Cuts like a razor; compact and sturdy.

This fixed blade machete features a very strong and sturdy full tang construction from a single piece of forged stainless steel, finished in a black anodized finish. The machete has a jungle style recurved zigzag serrated blade; used for sawing limbs when hacking it won't cut it down.

The overall length of the machete is 15.5" while the length of the blade is 9.5" and 3mm thick. The ergonomic curved handle fits nicely in hand and is wrapped with black 550 survival paracord which can be useful in an emergency situation.

The blade comes with a black fitted nylon sheath with hanging hook and loop belt fastener, and there's also a lanyard hole with lanyard for easy carrying when not in use. Search Terms: full tang handheld long blade garden machete tactical fixed every day carry out trail clearing bushwhacking jungle cutter small brush and tree shrubs ninja dagger Features: - Light weight full tang machete one-piece construction with recurved blade and serrated spine; solidly made from a high-quality 420 stainless steel treated for optimal edge retention and resistance to rust and corrosion - Overall Length: 15.5 inches; Blade Length: 9.5 inches; Blade Thickness: 3mm; Ideal backpacking machete for blazing trails through the forest - Ergonomic full tang paracord wrapped handle; recurved fixed blade; zigzag serrated spine; nylon sheath included - Ideal for camping and outdoor adventures but also practical around the house or out in the field for day to day bushwacking - Lanyard hole and black fitted nylon sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
